bursa.description: Discover restaurants in Bursa with GastroSkor: see gastro scores, member reviews and Google ratings in one screen. Search venues for İskender, kebab, döner and regional flavors; leave a GS review or
bursa.registeredSubtitle: Venues in the GastroSkor database — click on the name to go to their score and review page.
bursa.noResultsWithTag: No registered restaurants found for {tag}; try the live search above to find Bursa venues.
bursa.noResultsDefault: No registered restaurants yet; use the live search above to find Bursa venues.
bursa.whatIsGastroContent: "Gastro" here is used in the sense of gastronomy and food culture. GastroSkor is an independent platform that rates restaurants across Bursa and Turkey — it has no connection to gastroenterology in the medical sense.
